title: Verify end-to-end: scan QR with phone
description: Manual verification: start the app, navigate to a show detail view, confirm QR icon appears on match rows but not promo rows, click QR icon, confirm dialog shows QR code and URL. Navigate directly to MatchView and confirm Share QR Code button appears. Scan QR with a phone and confirm it opens the correct match URL. Part of EPIC ATW-131.

title: Add QR button to MatchView header
description: Add a Share QR Code button (VaadinIcon.QRCODE) to the MatchView header/toolbar. Clicking opens QrCodeDialog with the current matchId from the :matchId route parameter. Part of EPIC ATW-131.

title: Add QR button to ShowDetailView segment grid rows
description: Add a VaadinIcon.QRCODE icon button to the actions column of the segment grid in ShowDetailView. Visible only for match-type segments (not promos). Clicking opens QrCodeDialog with the segment's match ID. Part of EPIC ATW-131.

title: Create QrCodeDialog Vaadin component
description: Create QrCodeDialog.java in management/ui/view/match extending Vaadin Dialog. Constructor takes matchId, builds full URL via UrlUtil.getBaseUrl(), generates QR via QrCodeUtil, displays as Vaadin Image (data:image/png;base64,...) with URL text below. Mirrors GenericImageGenerationDialog pattern. Part of EPIC ATW-131.

title: Create QrCodeUtil server-side generation utility
description: Create QrCodeUtil.java in management/util package with a toBase64Png(String content, int size) method using ZXing to generate a QR code returned as a base64-encoded PNG string. Reuses UrlUtil.getBaseUrl() to build match URLs. Part of EPIC ATW-131.

title: Add ZXing dependencies to pom.xml
description: Add com.google.zxing:core and com.google.zxing:javase (v3.5.3) to pom.xml to enable server-side QR code generation. Part of EPIC ATW-131.

title: EPIC: QR code share button for match URL
description: Bookers need a quick way to share the MatchView URL with players during live sessions. This epic adds a QR code feature: a button on ShowDetailView match segment rows and in the MatchView header that opens a dialog containing a scannable QR code encoding the full match URL. Players scan with their phones to go directly to the match result page.

title: Verify end-to-end: scan QR with phone
description: Manual verification: start the app, navigate to a show detail view, confirm QR icon appears on match rows but not promo rows, click QR icon, confirm dialog shows QR code + URL, navigate to MatchView directly and confirm Share QR Code button appears. Scan QR with a phone and confirm it opens the correct match URL. Part of EPIC ATW-msm.

title: Add QR button to MatchView header
description: Add a Share QR Code button (with VaadinIcon.QRCODE) to the MatchView header/toolbar area. Clicking opens QrCodeDialog with the current matchId (already available from the :matchId route parameter). Part of EPIC ATW-msm.

title: Add QR button to ShowDetailView segment grid rows
description: Add a VaadinIcon.QRCODE icon button to the actions column of the segment grid in ShowDetailView. Button should only be visible for match-type segments (not promos). Clicking opens QrCodeDialog with the segment's match ID. Part of EPIC ATW-msm.

title: Create QrCodeDialog Vaadin component
description: Create QrCodeDialog.java in management/ui/view/match package extending Vaadin Dialog. Constructor takes matchId, builds the full URL via UrlUtil.getBaseUrl(), generates QR via QrCodeUtil, displays it as a Vaadin Image (data:image/png;base64,...) with the URL text below. Mirrors GenericImageGenerationDialog pattern. Part of EPIC ATW-msm.

title: Create QrCodeUtil server-side generation utility
description: Create QrCodeUtil.java in management/util package with a toBase64Png(String content, int size) method that uses ZXing to generate a QR code and returns it as a base64-encoded PNG string. Reuses UrlUtil.getBaseUrl() to build match URLs. Part of EPIC ATW-msm.

title: Add ZXing dependencies to pom.xml
description: Add com.google.zxing:core and com.google.zxing:javase (v3.5.3) to pom.xml to enable server-side QR code generation. Part of EPIC ATW-msm.

title: EPIC: QR code share button for match URL
description: Bookers need a quick way to share the MatchView URL with players during live sessions. This epic adds a QR code feature: a button on ShowDetailView match segment rows and in the MatchView header that opens a dialog containing a scannable QR code encoding the full match URL. Players scan with their phones to go directly to the match result page.

title: Implement modifyAttribute temporary/permanent buffs
description: CampaignEffectContext.modifyAttribute() is a stub. Implement attribute modification (e.g. brawl, charisma, resilience) that can be applied temporarily (match-scoped) or permanently via WrestlerState.

title: Implement modifyRoll/modifyOpponentRoll temporary modifiers
description: CampaignEffectContext.modifyRoll() and modifyOpponentRoll() are stubs. Implement a temporary modifier system in the Match Engine that applies a one-roll bonus or penalty for the player or opponent.

title: Implement modifyBackstageDice bonus dice
description: CampaignEffectContext.modifyBackstageDice() is a stub. Integrate with BackstageActionService to add bonus dice to the next backstage check for the active wrestler.

title: Implement gainInitiative in Match Engine
description: CampaignEffectContext.gainInitiative() is a stub. Implement initiative assignment in the Match Engine so a script can transfer initiative to the player who played the card.

title: Implement negateAttack in Match Engine
description: CampaignEffectContext.negateAttack() is a stub. Implement attack cancellation in the Match Engine so an incoming attack can be voided by a script.

title: Implement pin/breakPin in Match Engine
description: CampaignEffectContext.pin() and breakPin() are stubs. Wire pin attempt and forced pin-break logic into the Match Engine's match flow.

title: Wire drawCard to Deck/Hand management
description: CampaignEffectContext.drawCard() is a stub. Integrate with the Deck and Hand management system to draw the specified number of cards for the active wrestler.

title: Wire gainMomentum to Match Engine momentum tracker
description: CampaignEffectContext.gainMomentum() is a stub. Integrate with the Match Engine's momentum tracker to add momentum for the active wrestler.

title: Wire spendStamina/gainStamina to Match Engine
description: CampaignEffectContext.spendStamina() and gainStamina() are stubs. Integrate both with the Match Engine to read and write the current stamina value for the active wrestler during a match.

title: Wire gainHitPoints/damage to Match Engine
description: CampaignEffectContext.gainHitPoints() and damage() are stubs. Integrate with the Match Engine to apply healing and damage to the active wrestler and opponent respectively.

title: Implement CampaignEffectContext integrations
description: CampaignEffectContext exposes a Groovy scripting API for Campaign Ability Cards but all methods are stubs. This epic covers wiring each method to the Match Engine, Deck/Hand management, and modifier systems so campaign scripts have real game effect.

title: Phase 5: Final cleanup and full verification of deprecated method removal
description:
After Phases 1-4, all 27 deprecated methods should be deleted. Final cleanup pass and full E2E test run to confirm nothing regressed.

**Why:** This is the gate phase that proves the entire refactor is safe before merging.

**Steps:**
1. Check if getDefaultState() is still referenced in Wrestler.java — if Phases 1-4 are complete it should have zero callers and can be deleted too.

2. Verify no @Deprecated annotations remain on Wrestler:
```bash
grep -n '@Deprecated' src/main/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/domain/wrestler/Wrestler.java
# must return zero results
```

3. Run full build:
```bash
mvn spotless:apply
mvn clean verify -Pe2e,coverage,production
```

4. Run targeted grep for any surviving deprecated callers:
```bash
grep -rn 'wrestler\.' src/main/ --include='*.java' | grep -E '(getTier|getBumps|getFans|setTier|setBumps|setCurrentHealth|getActiveInjuries|getTotalInjuryPenalty|getCurrentHealthWithPenalties|getFanWeight|addFans|canAfford|addBump|spendFans|refreshCurrentHealth|getFaction|setFaction|getManager|setManager|getPhysicalCondition|setPhysicalCondition|getMorale|setMorale|getManagementStamina|setManagementStamina|getInjuries)\(\)' | grep -v WrestlerState | grep -v WrestlerService
# must return zero results
```

5. Create beads issues for any E2E regressions discovered.

6. Push all commits:
```bash
git pull --rebase
bd dolt push
git push
git status  # must show 'up to date with origin'
```

**Acceptance criteria:** mvn clean verify passes with zero deprecated method callers remaining on Wrestler entity.

title: Phase 4: Fix production UI callers of deprecated Wrestler methods
description:
6 deprecated methods are called in production UI/service code. Each needs a universeId-aware replacement. Fix all callers, then delete the deprecated methods.

**Why:** UI components call deprecated getters on Wrestler that route through getDefaultState() instead of using the correct universe-scoped WrestlerState. This must be refactored before the stubs can be deleted.

**4A: getFanWeight() in ShowService (line 636)**
File: src/main/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/service/show/ShowService.java
- Replace wrestler.getFanWeight() with wrestler.getFanWeight(universeId)
- A non-deprecated overload getFanWeight(universeId) already exists on Wrestler
- Find universeId from the Show entity or UniverseContextService

**4B: getTier() across 9 locations**
Files + lines:
- PlayerCampaignCard.java:73
- RankingView.java:113
- TitleFormDialog.java:105
- NarrationDialog.java:506, 618
- DraftView.java:204
- GmDashboardView.java:92
- ShowPlanningAiService.java:275
- BackstageEncounterService.java:206
- CampaignEncounterService.java:308
Pattern: Replace wrestler.getTier() with wrestlerService.getOrCreateState(wrestler.getId(), universeId).getTier(). If universeId not in scope, inject UniverseContextService.

**4C: getBumps() in UI**
Files: PlayerCampaignCard.java:162,167; BackstageActionView.java:198
- Replace wrestler.getBumps() with state.getBumps() (WrestlerState already available or fetch it)

**4D: getActiveInjuries() in UI**
Files: PlayerCampaignCard.java:181; BackstageActionView.java:198
- Replace with: injuryService.getActiveInjuriesForWrestler(wrestler.getId(), universeId)
- Inject InjuryService if not already present

**4E: getCurrentHealthWithPenalties() in PlayerCampaignCard (lines 104, 105)**
- Replace with inline calculation:
  int totalInjuryPenalty = injuryService.getAllInjuriesForWrestler(wrestler.getId(), universeId)
      .stream().filter(i -> i.isCurrentlyActive()).mapToInt(Injury::getHealthPenalty).sum();
  int effectiveHp = Math.max(1, state.getCurrentHealth() - state.getBumps() - totalInjuryPenalty);

**4F: getTotalInjuryPenalty() in WrestlerSummaryCard (line 177)**
- WrestlerSummaryCard already loads injuries via injuryService.getAllInjuriesForWrestler()
- Replace wrestlerWithDetails.getTotalInjuryPenalty() with:
  injuries.stream().filter(Injury::isCurrentlyActive).mapToInt(Injury::getHealthPenalty).sum()

**After all callers updated, delete from Wrestler.java:**
- getTier() (~line 425)
- getBumps() (~line 439)
- getActiveInjuries() (~line 535)
- getTotalInjuryPenalty() (~line 541)
- getCurrentHealthWithPenalties() (~line 578)
- getFanWeight() (~line 584) [no-arg version only]

**Verification checklist:**
```bash
mvn spotless:apply
mvn test -Dtest='!*E2ETest'
grep -r '.getTier()\|.getBumps()\|.getActiveInjuries()\|.getTotalInjuryPenalty()\|.getCurrentHealthWithPenalties()\|.getFanWeight()' src/main/ --include='*.java' | grep -v 'WrestlerState\|WrestlerService'
# ^ must return zero results
```
notes: Additional production callers found during ATW-cz3: (7) setTier() — TierRecalculationService.java:175,208 (via WrestlerData interface), DataInitializer.java:962 (no-op on unsaved Wrestler — safe to just remove that line); WrestlerData interface itself declares setTier() at line 27 — must be removed from interface and TierRecalculationService refactored to cast to WrestlerState before calling setTier. (8) setBumps() — CampaignDashboardView.java:1084,1092 in addDebugSection() — migrate to get WrestlerState via WrestlerService.getOrCreateState() and call state.setBumps(). (9) getInjuries() — WrestlerNotionSyncService.java:127,129 — migrate to InjuryService.getAllInjuriesForWrestler(entity.getId(), universeId) or iterate wrestler states.

title: Phase 3: Refactor WrestlerService self-referential deprecated calls
description:
Three deprecated methods (getFans, addFans, canAfford) are called from within WrestlerService.java itself inside awardFans(). Fix the service to work directly against WrestlerState, then delete the deprecated stubs.

**Why:** WrestlerService.awardFans() calls deprecated methods on the Wrestler entity instead of operating on the WrestlerState it already has in hand. This is a self-referential loop through the deprecated layer.

**File:** src/main/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/service/wrestler/WrestlerService.java

**Goal for awardFans() (~lines 209-224):**
- The method already calls getOrCreateState(wrestlerId, universeId) — use that state variable
- Replace wrestler.canAfford(cost) with state.canAfford(cost)
- Replace wrestler.addFans(n) with state.setFans(Math.max(0, state.getFans() + n)) then save state
- Replace wrestler.getFans() with state.getFans()
- Ensure state is saved via wrestlerStateRepository.saveAndFlush(state) after mutation

**After fixing, delete from Wrestler.java:**
- getFans() (~line 417)
- addFans(long fanGain) (~line 546)
- canAfford(Long cost) (~line 556)

**Verification checklist:**
```bash
mvn spotless:apply
mvn test -Dtest='WrestlerService*,WrestlerIT*'
grep -r 'wrestler\.getFans()\|wrestler\.addFans(\|wrestler\.canAfford(' src/main/ --include='*.java'
# ^ must return zero results
```

**Anti-patterns:** Do NOT use wrestler.getDefaultState() — access state only through getOrCreateState(id, universeId).
close_reason: Deleted dead 2-arg awardFans from WrestlerService; migrated test addFans callers to state.setFans(); deleted Wrestler.addFans() and canAfford()

title: Phase 2: Migrate test-only deprecated Wrestler setters to WrestlerState
description:
5 deprecated methods have callers only in test files. Update each test to use WrestlerState directly, then delete the deprecated methods.

**Why:** Tests are the last place using setTier/setBumps/setCurrentHealth on the Wrestler entity. Once tests use WrestlerState, these stubs can be deleted.

**Files to update:**

src/test/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/TestUtils.java (line 113)
- Replace wrestler.setTier(tier) with:
  WrestlerState state = wrestlerService.getOrCreateState(wrestler.getId(), 1L);
  state.setTier(tier);
  wrestlerStateRepository.saveAndFlush(state);

src/test/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/controller/rivalry/RivalryControllerIT.java (lines 267, 271, 273)
- Replace wrestler.setCurrentHealth(...), wrestler.setBumps(...), wrestler.setTier(...) with WrestlerState equivalents.

src/test/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/controller/injury/InjuryControllerIT.java (lines 142, 146, 148)
- Replace setCurrentHealth, setBumps, setTier on Wrestler with WrestlerState setters.

src/test/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/controller/title/TitleControllerIT.java (line 175)
- Replace wrestler.setCurrentHealth(...).

src/test/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/domain/wrestler/WrestlerHealthCalculationTest.java (line 49)
- Replace wrestler.setCurrentHealth(...).

src/test/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/domain/show/segment/SegmentSerializationTest.java (lines 56, 62, 63, 73)
- Replace setFaction, setBumps, setTier, getInjuries() on Wrestler with WrestlerState equivalents. For getInjuries() — WrestlerState.getInjuries() always returns empty; add injury via InjuryService or InjuryRepository instead.

**After all test updates pass, delete from Wrestler.java:**
- setTier(WrestlerTier tier) (~line 432)
- setBumps(Integer bumps) (~line 445)
- setCurrentHealth(Integer currentHealth) (~line 497)
- getInjuries() (~line 529)

**Verification checklist:**
```bash
mvn spotless:apply
mvn test -Dtest='RivalryControllerIT,InjuryControllerIT,TitleControllerIT,WrestlerHealthCalculationTest,SegmentSerializationTest'
grep -r '.setTier(\|.setBumps(\|.setCurrentHealth(\|.getInjuries()' src/ --include='*.java' | grep -v 'WrestlerState\|WrestlerService\|Wrestler.java'
# ^ must return zero results
```
notes: Phase 1 analysis found additional setFaction callers on Wrestler not in original description: SegmentSerializationTest.java:56 (wrestler.setFaction(faction)), AdvancedCampaignE2ETest.java:131 (player.setFaction(factions.get(0))), CampaignAdvancedChaptersE2ETest.java:203 (player.setFaction(faction)). These test callers must be migrated to use WrestlerState.setFaction() before setFaction() can be deleted from Wrestler.java.
close_reason: Migrated all test callers. Removed no-op setCurrentHealth/setBumps/setTier/setFaction calls from RivalryControllerIT, InjuryControllerIT, TitleControllerIT, WrestlerHealthCalculationTest, TestUtils, SegmentSerializationTest, TeamDTOTest. Removed vestigial setFaction setup from AdvancedCampaignE2ETest and CampaignAdvancedChaptersE2ETest (chapter forced directly). Deleted setFaction and setCurrentHealth from Wrestler.java. setTier/setBumps/getInjuries restored — production callers now documented in ATW-zm5.

title: Phase 1: Delete 14 zero-caller deprecated Wrestler methods
description:
Delete 14 deprecated methods from Wrestler.java that have zero callers anywhere in src/. Safe immediate deletion — no compile errors, no runtime changes.

**Why:** These methods have no callers. Deleting them removes misleading stubs with no refactoring cost.

**File to edit:** src/main/java/com/github/javydreamercsw/management/domain/wrestler/Wrestler.java

**Delete these methods (all @Deprecated @Transient):**
1. getFaction() (~line 452)
2. setFaction(Faction faction) (~line 458)
3. getManager() (~line 465)
4. setManager(Npc manager) (~line 471)
5. getPhysicalCondition() (~line 478)
6. setPhysicalCondition(Integer physicalCondition) (~line 484)
7. getCurrentHealth() (~line 491)
8. getMorale() (~line 504)
9. setMorale(Integer morale) (~line 510)
10. getManagementStamina() (~line 517)
11. setManagementStamina(Integer managementStamina) (~line 523)
12. addBump() (~line 551)
13. spendFans(Long cost) (~line 561)
14. refreshCurrentHealth() (~line 570)

**Verification checklist:**
```bash
mvn spotless:apply
mvn test -Dtest='!*E2ETest'
grep -r '.getFaction()\|.setFaction(\|.getManager()\|.setManager(\|.getPhysicalCondition(\|.setPhysicalCondition(\|.getMorale(\|.setMorale(\|.getManagementStamina(\|.setManagementStamina(\|.addBump(\|.spendFans(\|.refreshCurrentHealth(' src/ --include='*.java'
# ^ must return zero results
```

**Anti-patterns:** Do NOT remove getDefaultState() yet — it is still used by remaining deprecated methods in later phases.
notes: Analysis found only 6 of 14 methods are truly zero-caller: setPhysicalCondition, setMorale, setManagementStamina, addBump, spendFans, refreshCurrentHealth. The other 8 have active callers: getFaction (EditSegmentDialog, BackstageEncounterService, CampaignEncounterService, CampaignFactionService, WrestlerNotionSyncService), setFaction (SegmentSerializationTest, AdvancedCampaignE2ETest, CampaignAdvancedChaptersE2ETest), getManager (MatchView, WrestlerNotionSyncService), setManager (DataInitializer:970), getPhysicalCondition (WrestlerSummaryCard, PlayerView), getMorale (GmDashboardView), getManagementStamina (GmDashboardView), getCurrentHealth (called internally by getCurrentHealthWithPenalties which has callers in PlayerCampaignCard). canAfford was also kept - has caller in WrestlerService:209. Deleted only the 6 safe methods.
close_reason: Deleted 6 zero-caller methods: setPhysicalCondition, setMorale, setManagementStamina, addBump, spendFans, refreshCurrentHealth. Remaining 8 methods (getFaction, setFaction, getManager, setManager, getPhysicalCondition, getMorale, getManagementStamina, getCurrentHealth) have active callers catalogued in ATW-cz3 (test callers) and ATW-zm5 (production callers). canAfford kept — has caller in WrestlerService:209.

title: EPIC: Remove all deprecated Wrestler entity methods in favor of WrestlerState
description:
The Wrestler entity has 27 deprecated facade methods that delegate to WrestlerState via getDefaultState(). These stubs mislead callers into bypassing universe-aware state and must be removed.

**Why:** The codebase migrated from single-universe to multi-universe (Wrestler + WrestlerState per universeId). Deprecated methods used getDefaultState() which is fragile and non-deterministic in multi-universe contexts. The InjuryService fix (May 2026) confirmed the pattern: real state lives in WrestlerState, accessed via WrestlerService.

**How to apply:** Execute child phase issues in order. Each phase is self-contained with its own verification checklist. Recommended order: Phase 1 → Phase 3 → Phase 2 → Phase 4A-F → Phase 5.

**Key API reference:**
- wrestler.getTier() → wrestlerService.getOrCreateState(id, universeId).getTier()
- wrestler.getBumps() → state.getBumps()
- wrestler.getFans() → state.getFans()
- wrestler.getActiveInjuries() → injuryService.getActiveInjuriesForWrestler(id, universeId)
- wrestler.getFanWeight() → wrestler.getFanWeight(universeId) [non-deprecated overload exists]
- wrestler.canAfford(cost) → state.canAfford(cost)
